title: Properties and Changes of Matter
unitGoal: Students will describe matter by its properties, compare physical and chemical changes, and investigate mixtures, solutions, and changes of state.

lessons.title: Describing Matter by Its Properties
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on observable properties such as colour, texture, hardness, flexibility, magnetism, and solubility.

lessons.title: Solids, Liquids, and Gases
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on states of matter, particle spacing, and examples from everyday life.

lessons.title: Changes of State
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on melting, freezing, evaporation, condensation, and the role of heating and cooling.

lessons.title: Physical Changes
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on changes that affect size, shape, state, or mixture without making a new substance.

lessons.title: Chemical Changes
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on signs that a new substance may have formed, using safe and age-appropriate examples.

lessons.title: Mixtures and Solutions
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on mixtures, solutions, dissolving, and comparing mixtures that are easy or difficult to separate.

lessons.title: Separating Mixtures Responsibly
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on filtering, sorting, evaporating, and choosing responsible material uses.

lessons.title: Unit 3 Final Quiz
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned final quiz on properties, states, physical changes, chemical changes, mixtures, solutions, and separating materials.
